economic_notes: Old Massett Economic Development Corporation, Old Massett Economic Development Limited Partnership, and 1199196 B.C. Ltd. consolidated. 50% interest in Haida Gwaii Forest Products Joint Venture accounted for using modified equity method. Joint venture activity includes processing and sale of wood products. COVID-19 impacted operations including program delivery restrictions, capital project delays, reduced travel costs, and increased community support expenditures.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021, not 2024 as template default. Three entities fully consolidated: Old Massett Economic Development Corporation, Old Massett Economic Development Limited Partnership, and 1199196 B.C. Ltd. Haida Gwaii Forest Products Joint Venture (50%) accounted for using modified equity method with carrying value of $1. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($10,939,537) + FNHA ($92,458) + Province of BC ($784,536) + Gwaii Trust ($252,207) + Government of Canada ($171,911) + TRIC ($54,939) + BC Gaming ($1,301,307) = $13,597,895; OSR = Other income ($2,072,634) + Interest ($155,255) = $2,227,889. Tangible capital assets net book value per balance sheet is $18,417,146 which includes assets under construction of $3,948,599; net book value of completed assets per Schedule 1 is $14,468,547. No schedule of remuneration included in the document. COVID-19 impact disclosed. Defined contribution pension plan contributions of $292,537.
